page: Vultr vcg-a100-96c-896g-320vram is a Dedicated Metal GPU server configured with an AMD x86_64 processor. The system features 96 physical cores and 96 vCPUs, operating with one thread per core. It is equipped with 896.0 GB of system memory, yielding approximately 9.33 GB of RAM per core.

The server integrates four NVIDIA Ampere A100 GPUs, providing a combined total of 320 GB of VRAM. Local storage consists of a 3072 GB NVMe SSD. The network configuration includes one complimentary public IPv4 address.

This hardware profile is engineered for workloads requiring massive parallel processing capabilities and substantial memory capacity. Appropriate use cases include large-scale deep learning training, complex artificial intelligence inference, high-performance computing simulations, and data-intensive analytics. The high density of GPU and system memory resources provides qualitative cost efficiency for enterprise-level machine learning pipelines by consolidating heavy compute requirements onto a single physical node.
description: Vultr vcg-a100-96c-896g-320vram is a Dedicated Metal GPU server designed for high-performance parallel computing workloads. Built on the x86_64 architecture, it features an AMD processor with 96 physical cores and 96 vCPUs operating with a single thread per core. The system is equipped with 896.0 GB of system memory, providing 9.33 GB of RAM per core. For hardware acceleration, the server integrates four NVIDIA Ampere A100 GPUs delivering a total of 320 GB of VRAM. Local storage is provided by a 3072 GB NVMe SSD, and the network configuration includes one complimentary public IPv4 address. This highly resource-dense profile is optimized for demanding enterprise workloads, including large-scale deep learning model training, complex artificial intelligence inference, high-performance computing simulations, and massive data analytics pipelines.
og_description: Vultr vcg-a100-96c-896g-320vram is a Dedicated Metal GPU server featuring 96 AMD vCPUs, 896 GB RAM, 3072 GB NVMe SSD storage, and four NVIDIA A100 GPUs with 320 GB of total VRAM.
meta_description: Vultr vcg-a100-96c-896g-320vram is a Dedicated Metal GPU server with 96 AMD vCPUs, 896 GB RAM, 3072 GB NVMe storage, and four NVIDIA A100 GPUs.
tagline: A high-density GPU server featuring four NVIDIA A100 accelerators, 96 AMD cores, and 896 GB of system memory for demanding AI workloads.
bullet_points: Four NVIDIA Ampere A100 GPUs with 320 GB total VRAM
96 AMD physical cores and vCPUs on x86_64 architecture
896.0 GB of system memory with 9.33 GB per core
3072 GB of high-speed local NVMe SSD storage
Designed for deep learning, AI inference, and HPC simulations
